topic.angle: humidifier types: ultrasonic vs evaporative, tank size, and mold prevention

instructions: Write one bilingual draft (en+ko, draft:true) with contentProfile:buying-guide. Writing mode: stable. Tone: question-led. Follow docs/templates/buying-guide.md and docs/CONTENT_STANDARDS.md. Season priority: summer; active events: 여름·방학, 폭염·냉방. Publish-ready before complete: description 50–160 chars (en+ko), "## FAQ" / "## 자주 묻는 질문" with ≥3 ### Q&A pairs (profile minimum), coverImage on disk, profile template sections. Run `npm run content:integrity:repair` (or `node scripts/check-integrity.mjs {slug} --draft --repair`) — must pass with zero errors. Do NOT use `npm run content:validate` alone (published posts only). Then set status to complete.
